LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEE OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CA; CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CA; AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CA AND NORTHERN CA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. (PRINCIPAL AND COST - $504,282.59) NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR # 4780 301/PHA
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, in their capacities as Trustee of the Carpenters Health and Welfare Trust Fund for CA; Carpenters Vacation-Holiday Trust Fund for Northern CA; Carpenters Pension Trust Fund for Northern CA; Carpenters Annuity Trust Fund for Northern CA; and Carpenters Training Trust Fund for Northern CA and Northern CA Carpenters Regional Council's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. (PRINCIPAL AND COST - $504,282.59) NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR # 4780 =301/PHA
